title: After the Takarazuka Kinen: A Strong Umamusume

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho of the Triple Tiara tour beats out
the mighty competition and takes first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At first, the racecourse is dead silent. Then, a
delayed cacophony of cheers and applause
breaks out, proving the magnitude of what Sweep
Tosho has accomplished.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Sweep Tosho hadn't been racing against the
ultimate hero, Zenno Rob Roy, she would never
have been able to cast her ultimate racing magic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The articles that follow the Takarazuka Kinen
speak of its spectators feeling almost as if they
were under a magic spell.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing the word "magic" in the articles, an
unusually innocent smile spreads across Sweep
Tosho's face.
